options.content:
# File Lineage Tracker
Enter a filename or path below to track every operation on that file — creation, reads, writes, renames, and deletes. Use `*` as a wildcard (e.g. `/data/*.csv` or `*/report.txt`).

panels.title: File Lifecycle Summary
panels.description: Key lifecycle events: when the file was created, last written, last read, deleted, or renamed — and by whom.

targets.rawSQL:
WITH created AS (
  SELECT time, IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) as user_name, client_ip, protocol, num_bytes
  FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
  WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
    AND login_name <> 'audit' AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)') AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
    AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}') AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
    AND rpc_type IN ('CREATE', 'MKNOD')
  ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1
),
last_write AS (
  SELECT time, IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) as user_name, client_ip, protocol, num_bytes
  FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
  WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
    AND login_name <> 'audit' AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)') AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
    AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}') AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
    AND rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT')
  ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
),
last_read AS (
  SELECT time, IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) as user_name, client_ip, protocol, num_bytes
  FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
  WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
    AND login_name <> 'audit' AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)') AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
    AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}') AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
    AND rpc_type IN ('READ', 'READDIR', 'READDIRPLUS', 'GET_OBJECT')
  ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
),
deleted AS (
  SELECT time, IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) as user_name, client_ip, protocol, num_bytes
  FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
  WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
    AND login_name <> 'audit' AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)') AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
    AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}') AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
    AND rpc_type IN ('DELETE', 'REMOVE', 'UNLINK', 'RMDIR', 'DELETE_OBJECT')
  ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
),
renamed AS (
  SELECT time, IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) as user_name, client_ip, protocol, num_bytes
  FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
  WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
    AND login_name <> 'audit' AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)') AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
    AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}') AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
    AND rpc_type = 'RENAME'
  ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 'Created' AS "Event", to_iso8601(time) AS "Time", user_name AS "User", client_ip AS "Client IP", protocol AS "Protocol", num_bytes AS "Bytes" FROM created
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Last Written', to_iso8601(time), user_name, client_ip, protocol, num_bytes FROM last_write
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Last Read', to_iso8601(time), user_name, client_ip, protocol, num_bytes FROM last_read
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Deleted', to_iso8601(time), user_name, client_ip, protocol, num_bytes FROM deleted
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Renamed', to_iso8601(time), user_name, client_ip, protocol, num_bytes FROM renamed

SELECT count(*)
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)))
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT protocol)
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')

SELECT COALESCE(sum(num_bytes), 0)
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')

panels.title: Avg Ops/Sec Over Time by Type
panels.description: File activity over time, grouped by operation category.

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT
  date_trunc('minute', time) - (extract(minute from time) % 5) * interval '1' minute as time,
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('READ', 'READDIR', 'READDIRPLUS', 'GET_OBJECT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Read",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Write",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('CREATE', 'MKDIR', 'MKNOD') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Create",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('DELETE', 'REMOVE', 'UNLINK', 'RMDIR', 'DELETE_OBJECT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Delete",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type = 'RENAME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Rename",
  ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('LOOKUP', 'GETATTR', 'ACCESS', 'READLINK', 'SETATTR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / 300, 2) as "Metadata"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', time) - (extract(minute from time) % 5) * interval '1' minute
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cumulative Bytes Written
panels.description: Running total of bytes written to this file over time.

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT t.time, SUM(t.bytes_per_interval) OVER (ORDER BY t.time) as "Cumulative Bytes"
FROM (
  SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) - (extract(minute from time) % 5) * interval '1' minute as time, SUM(num_bytes) as bytes_per_interval
  FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
  WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
    AND login_name <> 'audit'
    AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
    AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
    AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
    AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
    AND rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT')
  GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', time) - (extract(minute from time) % 5) * interval '1' minute
) t
ORDER BY t.time

panels.title: Who Touched This File
panels.description: Per-user summary: what each user did, when they first and last accessed the file, from which machines.

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT
  IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) AS "User",
  COUNT(*) AS "Total Ops",
  to_iso8601(MIN(time)) AS "First Access",
  to_iso8601(MAX(time)) AS "Last Access",
  SUM(num_bytes) AS "Total Bytes",
  ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT rpc_type), ', ') AS "Operations",
  ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT protocol), ', ') AS "Protocols",
  ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT client_ip), ', ') AS "Client IPs"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR))
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

panels.title: Access by Client IP
panels.description: Which machines accessed this file and how many operations each performed.

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT
  client_ip AS "Client IP",
  SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('READ', 'READDIR', 'READDIRPLUS', 'GET_OBJECT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "Read",
  SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('WRITE', 'PUT_OBJECT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "Write",
  SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('CREATE', 'MKDIR', 'MKNOD') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "Create",
  SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('DELETE', 'REMOVE', 'UNLINK', 'RMDIR', 'DELETE_OBJECT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "Delete",
  SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type = 'RENAME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "Rename",
  SUM(CASE WHEN rpc_type IN ('LOOKUP', 'GETATTR', 'ACCESS', 'READLINK', 'SETATTR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as "Metadata"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY client_ip
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Rename / Move Chain
panels.description: Recent file rename and move events showing old path → new path with user and timestamp.

targets.rawSQL:
SELECT
  to_iso8601(time) AS "Time",
  IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) AS "User",
  element_at(split(rename_path, '/'), -1) AS "Old Name",
  '→' AS " ",
  element_at(split(path.path, '/'), -1) AS "New Name",
  element_at(split(rename_path, '/'), -2) AS "Old Dir",
  element_at(split(path.path, '/'), -2) AS "New Dir",
  protocol AS "Protocol",
  client_ip AS "Client IP"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE rpc_type = 'RENAME'
  AND (path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%') OR rename_path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%'))
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)') AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}') AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 25

SELECT client_ip AS "Client IP",
       IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) AS "User",
       protocol AS "Protocol",
       rpc_type AS "RPC Type",
       path.path AS "Filename",
       to_iso8601(time) AS "Time",
       status AS "Status",
       num_bytes AS "Size",
       num_ops AS "Operations"
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY client_ip,
         IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)),
         protocol, rpc_type, path.path, to_iso8601(time),
         status, num_bytes, num_ops
ORDER BY time ASC
LIMIT 1000

SELECT rpc_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY rpc_type
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT protocol, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY protocol
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR)) AS user,
       COUNT(*) AS count
FROM ${trino_catalog}."vast-audit-log-bucket/vast_audit_log_schema".vast_audit_log_table
WHERE path.path LIKE replace('${file_search}%', '*', '%')
  AND login_name <> 'audit'
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '(null)')
  AND not starts_with(path.path, '/.vast_audit_dir/')
  AND time >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date}')
  AND time <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date}')
GROUP BY IF(login_name!='', login_name, 'uid'||cast(uid as VARCHAR))
ORDER BY count DESC

list.description: File path to search. Use * as wildcard (e.g. /data/trading/*.csv or */report.txt)
list.label: File / Path Search
list.name: file_search
